.gitignore.purpose: verify root file exclusion rules remain routed

.gitleaks.toml.purpose: verify root security config remains routed

AGENTS.md.purpose: verify root routing remains visible to the audit

CODEOWNERS.purpose: verify review routing mirrors owner-map ownership

README-jankurai-scaffold.md.purpose: verify scaffold marker remains visible to the audit

SECURITY.md.purpose: verify repository security guidance remains routed

agent-index.json.purpose: verify generated agent index remains routed

agent-index.md.purpose: verify generated agent index remains routed

agent/.purpose: verify manifests remain parseable and authoritative

agent/coverage-sources.toml.command: jankurai coverage audit . --config agent/coverage-sources.toml --json target/jankurai/coverage/coverage-audit.json --md target/jankurai/coverage/coverage-audit.md && just score
agent/coverage-sources.toml.purpose: verify coverage evidence source routing and score import

agent/zyal/.purpose: verify canonical ZYAL runbooks stay under agent/zyal and only use the .zyal extension

apps/.purpose: verify app surfaces remain routed through the audit

apps/api/.purpose: verify API contract tests route through the integration test lane

apps/web/.purpose: verify rendered web UX evidence remains routed

contracts/.purpose: advisory contract drift scan until project-specific contract checks exist

contracts/events/.purpose: verify event contract scaffold stays routed

crates/.purpose: verify Rust behavior and audit checks

crates/jankurai/src/audit/coverage.rs.command: jankurai coverage audit . --config agent/coverage-sources.toml --json target/jankurai/coverage/coverage-audit.json --md target/jankurai/coverage/coverage-audit.md && just score
crates/jankurai/src/audit/coverage.rs.purpose: verify coverage parsers and evidence normalization

crates/jankurai/src/commands/coverage.rs.command: jankurai coverage audit . --config agent/coverage-sources.toml --json target/jankurai/coverage/coverage-audit.json --md target/jankurai/coverage/coverage-audit.md && just score

db/constraints/.purpose: advisory constraint-lane health check until DB proof exists

db/migrations/.purpose: advisory control-plane health check until migration tests exist

docs/COVERAGE_*.md.purpose: verify coverage evidence docs remain routed

docs/architecture/.purpose: verify architecture docs remain visible to the audit

docs/decisions/.purpose: verify decision records remain visible to the audit

examples/labs/exception-zoo/.purpose: verify exception zoo lab cases remain routed

examples/labs/repo-shape-bench/arcified/.purpose: verify repo-shape bench cases remain routed

jankurai_tracker.md.purpose: verify jankurai work tracker remains routed for joint claude/codex coordination

justfile.purpose: verify build lane definitions remain routed

labs/.purpose: verify lab fixtures remain routed under the bench harness

labs/repo-shape-bench/arcified/.purpose: verify repo-shape bench cases remain routed

ops/.purpose: verify operational assets remain routed under the security lane

ops/ci/.purpose: verify systemd and CI ops assets remain routed

proof-lanes.toml.purpose: verify proof lane map remains routed

release.policy.toml.purpose: verify release gate policy remains tested and routed

python/ai-service/.purpose: verify python AI service routing remains visible to the audit

schemas/coverage-*.schema.json.purpose: verify coverage evidence schemas and fixtures

scripts/.purpose: verify CI helper scripts remain routed through the audit

src/.purpose: verify Rust source files remain routed

src/test_intel/.purpose: verify VTI test-intelligence sources remain routed

token-budget.toml.purpose: verify version metadata remains visible to the audit
